# Post-Launch Learning Review

## Summary

- Product or feature:
- Launch date:
- Review date:
- Owner:
- Current lifecycle gate: Maturity

## Outcome Review

- Target outcome:
- Actual outcome:
- Evidence source:
- Confidence level:

## Signal Review

- Customer feedback:
- Usage analytics:
- Support load:
- Reliability or incident data:
- Security, privacy, or accessibility findings:
- Cost-to-serve impact:

## What Worked

List practices, decisions, or platform support that should be reinforced.

## What Did Not Work

List weak trails, friction, incidents, delays, or quality gaps.

## Decisions

- [ ] Continue
- [ ] Expand
- [ ] Platformize
- [ ] Pivot
- [ ] Sunset

| Action | Owner | Due Date | Evidence Of Completion |
